narrative:
Claibourne (precinct in Union County) has 925 registered voters, with 47.6% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 44.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 35.6 percentage points.
